primary_topic: Best Wood for Las Vegas Fences
answer_summary: Las Vegas sits on alluvial valley soils where caliche/hard layers can make post holes a pain and can push runoff to the pool and wash out around posts during monsoon bursts—so the structure matters as much as the boards
speakable_summary: Las Vegas sits on alluvial valley soils where caliche/hard layers can make post holes a pain and can push runoff to the pool and wash out around posts during monsoon burs
